title: node:fs async scalar writes can retain RAB input until worker write
unsafe_operation: node:fs async scalar write arguments capture StringOrBuffer input for later worker-side args.buffer.slice() or args.data.slice() writes
invariant: Async filesystem writes must not read bytes from caller-controlled resizable ArrayBuffer storage after the JS-visible buffer can be resized or detached
safe_caller: fs.write, fs.promises.write, FileHandle.write, fs.writeFile, fs.promises.writeFile, fs.appendFile, fs.promises.appendFile, FileHandle.writeFile, or FileHandle.appendFile with a resizable ArrayBuffer-backed BufferSource resized before async completion
fix_options: Snapshot or copy resizable ArrayBuffer-backed scalar write inputs into stable owned storage before async filesystem worker scheduling
Keep the first implementation slice focused on input-only scalar write APIs: write, writeFile, and appendFile
Preserve fixed Buffer, string, AbortSignal, path, flag, mode, and existing ThreadSafe protect/unprotect behavior outside the RAB-backed input path
do_not_touch: Do not bundle read, readv, writev, or FdVectorIo vector/copy-back semantics into this scalar write input slice
Do not claim Node parity, UB proof, Miri-clean status, or analyzer discovery from this manual packet
Do not turn this manual/advisory candidate into default CI enforcement or automatic GitHub comments

evidence.summary: Manual route pins async binding dispatch at node_fs_binding.rs line 83, AsyncFSTask/ThreadSafe worker dispatch at node_fs.rs lines 1279 and 1344, Write StringOrBuffer capture at line 3795, writeFile/appendFile encoded capture at lines 4336-4337 and 4359, and worker-side materialization at lines 6335, 6350, 4874, and 7490
evidence.limitation: source trace only; does not prove a resizable backing store reaches the worker or that a witness executed this site

evidence.summary: External Bun scout matrix reported stale-input or EFAULT-shaped async node:fs write behavior after resizable ArrayBuffer-backed input was resized before promise, callback, or FileHandle completion
evidence.limitation: runtime route evidence only; not memory-safety proof, not UB proof, not policy-ready Node parity, and not analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Miri model covers the stale span shape outside the Bun runtime, where a saved pointer/length pair is read after backing storage changes
evidence.limitation: model evidence only; does not prove the Bun site executed under Miri or that read/vector copy-back policy is in scope

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
